name: ChatGPT: Fetch estuary artifact as base64
summary: Fetch a ChatGPT estuary artifact URL inside the authenticated chatgpt.com browser context and return base64 bytes.

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const url=cleanArg(arg0);if(!url)throw new Error('content_url is required');const res=await fetch(url,{credentials:'include'});if(!res.ok)throw new Error('fetch '+res.status);const cd=res.headers.get('content-disposition')||'';const ct=res.headers.get('content-type')||'';const m=cd.match(/filename\*?=(?:UTF-8'')?"?([^";]+)"?/i);const fileName=m?decodeURIComponent(m[1].replace(/"/g,'')):'onboarding-plan.zip';const bytes=new Uint8Array(await res.arrayBuffer());let binary='';const chunk=0x8000;for(let i=0;i<bytes.length;i+=chunk){binary+=String.fromCharCode(...bytes.subarray(i,i+chunk));}return{url,status:res.status,content_type:ct,file_name:fileName,size_bytes:bytes.length,base64:btoa(binary)};
